data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of transitioning from discovery facts to explicit share requests. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case explicitly states the need for this capability, but the absence of relevant evidence indicates a gap in the implementation.
gaps: No evidence of implementation or validation of the ability to transition from discovery facts to explicit share requests.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
